title: cyperus coriifolius
intro: Cyperus coriifolius, also known as Cyperus cyperus or water sago, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus coriifolius include treating various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-diabetic effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions.
